name: Mushroom-Couscous Pilaf
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups boiling water, or veggie broth
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonstick pan (or spray a pan with cooking spray), add mushrooms, onions, celery, and garlic. Cook for 25 minutes, stirring frequently, until most of the liquid has cooked out.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 C).
3. Lightly oil an 8-inch square baking dish or spray with a nonstick cooking spray.
4. Remove mushroom mixture from heat and stir in spices and couscous. Mix well.
5. Spoon mixture into prepared dish. Stir in boiling water.
6. Cover and bake for 35 minutes.
7. Fluff with a fork before serving.
Per serving: 137 calories, .5 g fat, 2.9% protein, fiber, carbs from Fats (CFF). This recipe is adapted from one from DEEANNE's recipe files.
